t_ch: 文人雅士都爱来到这里…
t_en: The literati all love coming here...

t_ch: 你知道为什么吗？
t_en: And do you know why?

t_ch: 这里景色优美？
t_en: Because of the beautiful scenery?

t_ch: 这里消费便宜。
t_en: Because it's cheap here.

t_ch: 文人雅士没有闲钱。
t_en: All literati have no dispensable cash.

t_ch: 我还是第一次见魔阴身。
t_en: This is my first time seeing a mara-struck.

t_ch: 我也会变成那样吗？
t_en: Will I become like that, too?

t_ch: 这种事情，不要啊！
t_en: No, not like this!

t_ch: 建木，好大——
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor... It's massive...

t_ch: 好大——
t_en: Massive...

t_ch: 我好想爬上去看看。
t_en: I wanna climb up and see the view.

t_ch: 你就只是在吹牛吧？
t_en: Are you just bragging?

t_ch: 爬就爬，我最会爬了。
t_en: I'm the best climber there is!

t_ch: 年度犯罪率又降低了…
t_en: The crime rate is down again this year...

t_ch: 仙舟真和平啊…
t_en: It's so safe and peaceful aboard the Xianzhou...

t_ch: 您不能持有这个…
t_en: You can't have this...

t_ch: 凭什么啊？
t_en: And why not?

t_ch: 这个有年龄分级…
t_en: It's age-restricted...

t_ch: …您还不够年龄。
t_en: ...And you're not old enough.

t_ch: 这都是什么道理啊！
t_en: What kind of logic is this!?

t_ch: 老实点！每次都有你！
t_en: Tell the truth! You're here every time!

t_ch: 我再也不敢了…
t_en: No way...

t_ch: 你上回也是这么说的！
t_en: That's what you said last time!

t_ch: 有话好好说…
t_en: Let's talk calmly...

t_ch: 我和她没话说！
t_en: I've got nothing to say to her!

t_ch: 这日子是没法过了！
t_en: I'm sick of this!

t_ch: 都消消气…
t_en: Calm down...

t_ch: 户籍科效率好低…
t_en: Household registrations are so inefficient...

t_ch: 体谅一下，他们忙…
t_en: Be considerate, they're very busy...

t_ch: 他们忙，我还忙呢！
t_en: So am I!

t_ch: 吾有一言，名之曰「零」。
t_en: I've got one word for you: "Zero."

t_ch: 再有一言，名之曰「一」。
t_en: And another word for you: "One."

t_ch: 「一零一零一零」者…
t_en: As a "<unbreak>101010</unbreak>" person...

t_ch: 运之于「道」。
t_en: This is Your Way.

t_ch: 吾有一数，复行癸遍。
t_en: I'm thinking of a number, over and over again.

t_ch: 你们卜者说话真奇怪…
t_en: You diviners sure talk funny...

t_ch: 皆是天问，不可语人。
t_en: These are divine messages beyond the ken of mortals.

t_ch: 看着我的拳头，说人话！
t_en: Then take a look at this fist, and start talking more like a mortal!

t_ch: …我说，我还得算算。
t_en: ...I said, let me conduct my divination.

t_ch: 这下我听懂了。
t_en: Now that, I can understand.

t_ch: 要是能计算犯罪概率…
t_en: If only you could divine crime statistics...

t_ch: 就能在犯罪前将其抓捕。
t_en: We could arrest people before they even commit a crime.

t_ch: 这样的计算靠谱吗？
t_en: Is it reliable, though?

t_ch: 要是卜者们结果不同呢？
t_en: What if diviners reach different conclusions?

t_ch: 那就少数服从多数呗。
t_en: Then the minority accedes to the majority.

t_ch: 你是认真的吗？
t_en: Are you serious?

t_ch: 听说工造司戒严放假…
t_en: I heard the Artisanship Commission is on vacation due to martial law...

t_ch: 那为啥我们还在加班…
t_en: So what are we doing working overtime for, then...

t_ch: 工作性质不同吧…
t_en: We work different jobs...

t_ch: 有道理。
t_en: Fair enough.

t_ch: 我们才是仙舟的栋梁…
t_en: We are the true backbone of Xianzhou...

t_ch: 未料有此劫…
t_en: But this disaster is unpredicted...

t_ch: 我们会安全吗？急死我了。
t_en: Will we be safe? My anxiety is through the roof.

t_ch: 我知道你很急，先别急。
t_en: I know you're anxious about it. Don't worry.

t_ch: 你是说未来事情会好转？
t_en: Are you saying everything is going to turn out okay?

t_ch: 你现在急也没有用。
t_en: There's no point in panicking now.

t_ch: 因为后来有的你急。
t_en: Because you are going to have something to panic about real soon.

t_ch: 答案是三又四分之三…
t_en: The answer is three and three-quarters...

t_ch: 你觉得那能对吗？
t_en: You think that could be right?

t_ch: 织机神算无误！
t_en: The loom of the universe weaves only the truth!

t_ch: 你好好动动脑子！
t_en: Use your brain.

t_ch: 建木生发，孽物横行…
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor sprouts, and evil runs rampant...

t_ch: 难道这也在计算之中吗？
t_en: Is all this within your prophecy, too?

t_ch: 太卜大人！
t_en: Master Diviner!

t_ch: 这怎么可能啊！
t_en: How can this be!

t_ch: 在黉学读了一百年书…
t_en: I've studied in the lyceum for over a hundred years now...

t_ch: 怎么了呢？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: 每天修理家政机巧…
t_en: Repairing household machinery daily, without fail...

t_ch: 知足吧，知足常乐…
t_en: Be content. Be content, and you'll always have joy...

t_ch: 听说工造司薪资很高…
t_en: I heard they pay very well at the Artisanship Commission...

t_ch: 正常，毕竟技术工种…
t_en: Sure, they're all technicians...

t_ch: 但听说他们工作很累…
t_en: But I heard it's really hard work...

t_ch: 正常，毕竟技术工种…
t_en: Sure, they're all technicians...

t_ch: 金人系统自检程序启动…
t_en: Aurumaton self-diagnostics system is activated...

t_ch: 名之曰虚，恒为是矣。
t_en: It is the Void. It is the Truth.

t_ch: 这又是什么程序语言？
t_en: What programming language is this?

t_ch: 虚虚实实，名之曰谬。
t_en: Truth and Falsity. It is the Error.

t_ch: 是不是散热器坏了…
t_en: Is this thing overheating...?

t_ch: 过热导致元件出了问题…
t_en: Overheating can break hardware components...

t_ch: 谬谬谬谬谬谬谬…
t_en: Error error error error error error...

t_ch: 还挺有节奏感…
t_en: It's quite rhythmic...

t_ch: 要不辞职和它组团出道…
t_en: What if I quit my day job and form a band with it...?

t_ch: 会有危险吗…
t_en: Is that dangerous...?

t_ch: 要对技术有信心…
t_en: Have faith in technology...

t_ch: 说得也是…
t_en: You're right...

t_ch: 听说太卜司戒严放假…
t_en: I heard the Divination Commission is on vacation due to martial law...

t_ch: 凭啥啊？我们要加班！
t_en: Wha—!? But we're working overtime!

t_ch: 可能工作性质不同…
t_en: We do have different job descriptions...

t_ch: 我明白了…
t_en: I get it...

t_ch: 说明我们比他们重要！
t_en: That means we're more important than them!

t_ch: 我还从见过那样的建木…
t_en: I've never seen the Ambrosial Arbor behaving like this before...

t_ch: 之前就是这样的吗？
t_en: Was it always like this?

t_ch: 你问我我也不知道啊…
t_en: Don't ask me. I have no idea...

t_ch: 那是我出生之前的事了。
t_en: That was back before I was even born.

t_ch: 总之这不是什么好事。
t_en: Anyway, it doesn't bode well for anything.

t_ch: 作为造物来说…很雄伟…
t_en: As a divine creation, it's magnificent...

t_ch: 是啊，这一点我认可。
t_en: Yes, I can agree with that.

t_ch: 我在学宫里修习了二百七十年的宇航格物学，算得上当世泰斗了。
t_en: I've studied astrophysics at the academy for <unbreak>270</unbreak> years, and I am regarded as a leading modern authority on the matter.

t_ch: 哇，修了这么久，那你会修星槎吗？
t_en: Oh, that's a long time. So do you know how to repair starskiffs?

t_ch: 我学的不是这个！我学的是理论……
t_en: That's not my area of study! I'm a theoretical scholar...

t_ch: 切，那有什么用。
t_en: Tsk, useless.

s_ch: 推广仙舟美食的热心市民
s_en: Friendly Citizen Recommending Xianzhou Food Options
t_ch: 苏打豆汁儿是罗浮的特色，不得不品尝。
t_en: Mung bean soda is a specialty aboard the Luofu, and simply has to be tried.

s_ch: 被仙舟美食吓坏的无辜游客
s_en: Innocent Tourist Terrified by Xianzhou Cuisine
t_ch: 呕…如有冒犯就是冒犯，这玩意儿就是泔水。
t_en: Yuck... Sorry if it's offensive, but this stuff tastes like sewer water.

t_ch: 你听听这些广告词！「流落异世拣到应急食品，下口瞬间它吐气开声：我能满足你三个愿望…」
t_en: Listen to this ad! "I wander into another world and pick up an emergency food. The moment I put it into my mouth, it says 'I can grant you three wishes...'."

t_ch: 哼，有点意思…说下去。
t_en: Hmm, interesting... Go on.

t_ch: 「下等根器少年饱受欺辱，机缘偶得玉镯一枚，藏有武经万卷，同门纳头便拜…」
t_en: "A talentless youth who is sick of being bullied happened upon a splendid jade bracelet with miraculous properties. Everyone bowed down in worship..."

t_ch: 「流落异世拣到一方破壶，收纳灵田万亩，广厦千幢，且看我如何打破垄断成就地产大亨…」
t_en: "When I was wandering through strange lands, I chanced upon this cracked pot, which contains lands of countless residences. Watch as I beat the system to become a property tycoon..."

t_ch: 该从哪本追起呢？
t_en: Which book should I start with?

t_ch: 这后两本说的东西有半点幻想色彩吗？仙舟上的器物都能办到啊？
t_en: Do these last two books have any hint of fantasy in them? The instruments on Xianzhou can already do all that...

t_ch: 所以后两本的标签是「纪实文学」。
t_en: That's why those last two are tagged under the Documentary genre.

t_ch: 你看到了吧？那棵树…它长起来了！
t_en: Can you see it? That tree... It's growing!

t_ch: 根据《帝弓逸话》的记载，四千多年前，丰饶民纠集联军攻打罗浮时，正是为了这棵树啊！
t_en: Based on records from "the Reignbow Anecdotes," more than four thousand years ago, when the Denizens of Abundance rallied to attack the Luofu — it was for precisely this tree!

t_ch: 书里写的东西没想到是真的！
t_en: I never knew all that stuff from the books was true!

t_ch: 我不看书的，你别问我。
t_en: I don't read. Don't ask me.

t_ch: 建木重生，预示着大难临头啊！这一定是寿瘟祸祖干的！
t_en: The resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor heralds great misfortune! This must be the work of the Plagues Author!

t_ch: 他们都是业余乐手，怎么会这么受欢迎？
t_en: How can they be so popular when they're all music hobbyists?

t_ch: 他们水平还挺高的，况且仙舟乐本身的魅力也不可小觑。
t_en: They're quite skilled. And besides, the charm of Xianzhou music cannot be underestimated.

t_ch: 也对。那下个月给他们涨工资！
t_en: That's right. Then they should get a raise next month!

t_ch: 原来这是你的乐团啊？
t_en: So this is your band then?

t_ch: …不是…我就是想这么说一次，体会一下当老板的快乐……
t_en: ...Nope... I just wanted to say it once, and feel the joy of being someone's boss...

t_ch: 这棵树都枯萎了几千年…打我祖辈在「长乐天」定居开始，就能瞧见那半截残桩。
t_en: This tree has withered for thousands of years... Back when my ancestors first settled in the Exalting Sanctum, it was already half a stump.

t_ch: 它居然重新生长起来了，福祸难料啊。
t_en: But now that it's actually growing again, it's difficult to say whether it's a good or a bad thing.

t_ch: 传说里的故事都是真的？
t_en: Are the rumors and legends about it all true?

t_ch: 可能吧，传说里确实是这样说的…仙舟人的「无尽形寿」来自建木的果实。要不是这个传说，你们这些化外民也不会千里迢迢赶来啊。
t_en: Possibly, I mean that's what the legends say... The Xianzhou native's endless lifespan comes from the fruits of the Ambrosial Arbor. If it weren't for this legend, you Outworlders would never bother coming here.

t_ch: 我只是来做生意的…不过这下子，咱们这些外乡人也有份长生不老啦？
t_en: For me, it's just business... But now, us Outworlders can also become immortal?

t_ch: 仙舟律法十恶之首便是「令堕长生」。你要是动了念头，我劝你趁早死心。
t_en: The first of the Ten Unpardonable Sins of Xianzhou is Involuntary Immortalization. If you have any thought about attaining it, I'd advise you to give up any hopes before it's too late.

t_ch: 这个托蝶幻境是有年龄限制的，您还没到年龄，所以我们得没收它。
t_en: This Butterfly Immersia is age-restricted. We'll have to confiscate it, because you're underage.

s_ch: 来自异星的幻戏爱好者
t_ch: …可我都是成年人了啊！仙舟的法律真严格啊。
t_en: ...But I'm an adult! Xianzhou law sure is strict.

s_ch: 来自异星的幻戏爱好者
t_ch: 行吧，那我什么时候才能体验这个幻戏呢？
t_en: Okay, so where can I experience this fantasy then?

t_ch: 我给您看看…哦，这个幻戏分级是<unbreak>200</unbreak>岁以上的……
t_en: I'll check... Oh, this one is restricted to <unbreak>200</unbreak>-year-old and above...

s_ch: 来自异星的幻戏爱好者
t_ch: 什么！我这辈子都看不了了吗！
t_en: What!? Then I'll never be able to watch it in my lifetime!

s_en: Officer Stuck on a Family Affair
t_ch: 两位消消气，你们这样的情况，我已经见过成千上万遍，你们也不特殊。
t_en: Calm down, you two. I've seen this thousands of times before, and you're not special.

s_en: Officer Stuck on a Family Affair
t_ch: 要是想离婚，地衡司全力支持，请到我那里登记。
t_en: You have the full support of the Realm-Keeping Commission if you'd like to get a divorce. Register that with me.

s_en: Officer Stuck on a Family Affair
t_ch: 要是不想离婚，只是想让我们来帮忙劝和，你就眨眨眼，给我个暗号。
t_en: If you don't want to get divorced and just need some couples therapy from us, then just blink twice.

t_ch: 你这人怎么这么说话呢？我们回家吧，亲爱的。
t_en: How can you say that? Let's go home, darling.

t_ch: 是呀，怎么上来就劝别人离婚呢。走吧，别理会这蠢货执事了。
t_en: Yeah, how can you persuade people to get divorced from the get go? Let's leave. Ignore this stupid officer.

s_en: Officer Stuck on a Family Affair
t_ch: 哎，事情就这样顺利解决了。
t_en: Ah, well that's everything taken care of, then.

t_ch: 吾有一言，记之曰「零」。再有一言，记之曰「一」。
t_en: I've got one word for you: "Zero." And another word for you: "One."

t_ch: 六合之位各记曰「一零一零一零」者…录之于「道」，可推占……
t_en: Hexagraphic code is "1 - 0 - 1 - 0 - 1 - 0"... Broadcasting the Way, it can be seen...

t_ch: 师父，古籍里有载「阴阳」，何不以「阴」为阖，「阳」为开……
t_en: Master, ancient texts use Yin and Yang. Why not use Yin as shut, and Yang as open...

t_ch: 以前是这样命名的，自从和其他文明接轨后，咱们的算式都变了，都是文化入侵啊。
t_en: It used to be named thus, but since integration with other civilizations, our algorithm has changed. It's cultural invasion.

t_ch: 听说戒严以后工造司就提前放假了……
t_en: I heard the Artisanship Commission got off early due to martial law...

t_ch: 啊？为啥啊？他们提前放假，我们怎么反而要加班？
t_en: Mmm? Wha—!? Why are we working overtime, when they get off early?

t_ch: 不知道啊，我也是听说的…工作性质不同吧……
t_en: I dunno. It's just what I heard... We work different jobs...

t_ch: 我明白了，因为我们才是仙舟的栋梁。
t_en: Got it. Because we are the true backbone of Xianzhou.

t_ch: 一想到这里，我瞬间就不累了！还能再加班两个通宵！不，五个通宵！
t_en: As soon as I think about it, I'm not tired anymore! I can work two more overnight shifts! No, five more!

t_ch: 别卷了，求求你了。
t_en: Stop. Please.

t_ch: 织机绝对没出错啊，「三又四分之三」，这就是太卜司明日重病就医的人数。
t_en: The loom of the universe weaves only the truth. "Three and three-quarters," this is the number of the seriously ill who'll be treated tomorrow by the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 你给我讲讲，怎么可能有四分之三人受伤……
t_en: Tell me how it is possible that three quarters of a person are injured...

t_ch: 哦，帝弓在上，我好像明白了。
t_en: Oh, Reignbow above. I think I get it now.

t_ch: 听说戒严以后太卜司就提前放假了……
t_en: I heard the Divination Commission got off early due to martial law...

t_ch: 不是，凭啥啊！他们放假，我们怎么反而要加班？
t_en: No! How come!? Why are we working overtime, when they get off early?

t_ch: 我猜是因为工作性质不同吧…我也是听说的……
t_en: I guess it's because we work different jobs... It's just what I heard...

t_ch: 不过也合理。毕竟我们才是仙舟的栋梁。
t_en: But it's reasonable. We are the backbone of Xianzhou.

t_ch: 你可别自己骗自己了，领导的话是能认真听的？
t_en: Don't fool yourself. Can you really trust management?

t_ch: 我们之后会去向何方？
t_en: Where are we gonna go now?

t_ch: 我打算待会去码头…
t_en: I'm going to the dock later...

t_ch: 整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: To get some fried potato sticks.

t_ch: 你误会我了，伙计。
t_en: You've got me wrong, my friend.

t_ch: 我说的是一辈子的目标。
t_en: I'm talking about my lifetime goal.

t_ch: 归根到底活着为了什么?
t_en: What exactly is the purpose of life?

t_ch: 为了整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: To get some fried potato sticks.

t_ch: 这批货物登记不合规。
t_en: This batch of goods is not registered properly.

t_ch: 你们都说货物是自己的。
t_en: All of you claim ownership of the goods.

t_ch: 说说货箱里面都有啥…
t_en: Tell me what's inside the crate...

t_ch: 谁说对了，就给他。
t_en: I'll give the goods to whomever with the correct answer.

t_ch: 里面是培育星槎的肥料。
t_en: There's fertilizer for growing starskiff inside.

t_ch: 不流失！不蒸发！零浪费！
t_en: No loss! No evaporation! Zero waste!

t_ch: 错错错，里面是矿泉水。
t_en: You're wrong. There are bottles of mineral water inside.

t_ch: 我们是鳞渊境的搬运工。
t_en: We're porters from the Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 这货箱是我的！我的！
t_en: This crate is mine! Mine!

t_ch: 狡猾！狡猾！明明是我的！
t_en: You're a liar! That's a lie! It's obviously mine!

t_ch: 你们两个都说错啦！
t_en: Both of you are wrong!

t_ch: 这是扣押的违禁品。
t_en: It contains contraband goods that are confiscated.

t_ch: 天舶司一般会如何处置？
t_en: How does the Sky-Faring Commission usually deal with them?

t_ch: 公开拍卖、定向变卖…
t_en: Open auction, targeted sales...

t_ch: 移交、转交、销毁…
t_en: Giveaways, transference to other departments, or outright destruction...

t_ch: 这些里面装着是什么？
t_en: What's inside these?

t_ch: 来自翁瓦克的植物种子。
t_en: Plant seeds from Vonwacq.

t_ch: 看来是只能销毁了。
t_en: Looks like we have to destroy them.

t_ch: 听说三位卜官关系极差…
t_en: I hear the three managing diviners really hate each other...

t_ch: 还是聊点能聊的吧…
t_en: Let's talk about something else...

t_ch: 明阅大人逼迫绘星大人…
t_en: Mingyue forces Huixing to...

t_ch: 发了全司道歉信！
t_en: Issue a letter of apology to the entire company!

t_ch: 完了完了…
t_en: Uh-oh...

t_ch: 她们仨这是要撕破脸了…
t_en: The three are about to have a fallout soon...

t_ch: 绘星大人去找太卜大人…
t_en: Huixing went to the master diviner...

t_ch: 参了静斋大人一本。
t_en: To complain about Jingzhai.

t_ch: 我看太卜司是要变天了。
t_en: I think an upheaval is about to take place in the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 不至于，不至于…
t_en: It's not that bad...

t_ch: 都在太卜大人占测之内。
t_en: Everything has been foreseen by the master diviner.

t_ch: 「摘星社」带你游金人巷啦！
t_en: Star-Picking Tours will take you around the Aurum Alley!

t_ch: 罗浮夜市有哪些美食…
t_en: What kind of delicacies does the night market of Luofu offer?

t_ch: 市井小巷里有多少传说…
t_en: How many myths are circulated among the people in the alleys...

t_ch: 乾坤街里有何许门道…
t_en: What secrets are hidden in the Cosmos Street...

t_ch: 饕餮街里有什么历史…
t_en: What's the history of the Epicurean Street...

t_ch: 「摘星社」的向导更专业！
t_en: The guides at Star-Picking Tours are more professional!

t_ch: 金人巷一日游！
t_en: Aurum Alley one-day tour!

t_ch: 包船包饭一条龙！
t_en: Transportation and meals included!

t_ch: 不用签什么旅游合同！
t_en: There's no need to sign any tour contract!

t_ch: 绝对不会强制购物！
t_en: No compulsory purchases!

t_ch: 仙舟罗浮最实惠低价团。
t_en: This is the most affordable tour on the Luofu.

t_ch: 我想试试它家的新品诶……
t_en: I want to try their new dish...

t_ch: 啧，肯定不是什么好食材。
t_en: Tsk, I bet they use bad-quality ingredients.

t_ch: 鉴定一下热门美食。
t_en: Time to see what these local delicacies have to offer!

t_ch: 你干嘛非得吃那个啊。
t_en: Why are you so insistent on having that?

t_ch: 虽然不好吃但是能拍照…
t_en: It tastes awful, but it looks good in the photo...

t_ch: 我真是搞不懂你的口味。
t_en: I really can't understand your taste.

t_ch: 别废话了，去找下一家。
t_en: Cut the nonsense. Let's head to the next one.

t_ch: 这里和以前不一样了……
t_en: This place isn't the same as it used to be...

t_ch: …我觉得没什么区别啊。
t_en: ... It looks the same to me.

t_ch: 包子大，饺子小。
t_en: Dumplings and steamed buns!

t_ch: 几个包子就吃饱。
t_en: The buns are huge — just a few and you'll be full!

t_ch: 又好吃，又美味。
t_en: They are delicious.

t_ch: 花钱不多挺实惠。
t_en: And they don't cost you much.

t_ch: 皮还薄，馅还大。
t_en: The filling is generously wrapped in just enough skin.

t_ch: 好面好馅不要怕。
t_en: Don't worry about the quality of the ingredients.

t_ch: 趁热吃，别烫嘴。
t_en: Enjoy them while they are hot, but don't burn your tongue.

t_ch: 吃完以后心里美。
t_en: Fill up your tummy and your heart.

t_ch: 真是个*仙舟粗语*好日子…
t_en: What a *Xianzhou profanity* nice day...

t_ch: 没有事比得过这种感觉…
t_en: Nothing else beats this feeling...

t_ch: 看看这些*仙舟粗语*小吃…
t_en: Look at these *Xianzhou profanity* snacks...

t_ch: *仙舟粗语*活着真好…
t_en: *Xianzhou profanity*, life is great...

t_ch: 健身武术了解一下？
t_en: Interested in martial arts and fitness?

t_ch: 强身健体，不容错过！
t_en: Don't miss the opportunity to be fit!

t_ch: 我不懂茶，这都不是茶吧？
t_en: I know little about tea, but none of these is tea, right?

t_ch: 龙泉老窖，杏花佳酿…
t_en: Dragon Spring Brew, Apricot Blossom Reserve...

t_ch: 柳林琼浆，五谷玉液…
t_en: Nectar of Willow Woods, five-grain jade elixir...

t_ch: 这些都是茶呀？
t_en: Are these all teas?

t_ch: 这哪里是茶了？
t_en: Ugh... you call this tea?

t_ch: 老板说它们是茶就是茶。
t_en: They are, because the boss says so.

t_ch: 打弹珠！打弹珠！
t_en: Let's play Marbles!

t_ch: 什么弹珠？也给我玩玩吧。
t_en: Marbles? I wanna play too!

t_ch: 你要哪个，我这里有很多。
t_en: Which one do you want? I have plenty here.

t_ch: 黄岐解毒丸，拘挛复原丸…
t_en: Health Detox Pill, Spasm Recovery Pill...

t_ch: 五味逍遥丸，养心返魂丹…
t_en: Pentaflavor Relax Pill, Rejuvenation Pellet...

t_ch: 你别说了，我不玩了。
t_en: Thanks, but I think I'm out.

t_ch: 你爸爸是寿考堂做药的？
t_en: Your father makes medicines at Longevity Hall?

t_ch: 对呀。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 我怕你爸爸出来收拾你。
t_en: Your dad might come out and give you a whooping.

t_ch: 你知道金人巷的由来吗？
t_en: Do you know the history of Aurum Alley?

t_ch: 不知道啊。
t_en: I have no idea.

t_ch: 金人巷，有金人的小巷。
t_en: The Aurum Alley means an alley with aurumatons.

t_ch: 金人巷能真的有金人？
t_en: Is it true that there are aurumatons in the Aurum Alley?

t_ch: 那陈婆豆腐里有陈婆吗？
t_en: Well, is Granny Chen inside Granny Chen's Tofu?

t_ch: 你别欺负我不懂文化。
t_en: Just because I'm not as cultured as you doesn't mean you can bully me.

t_ch: 金人巷真的有金人啊！
t_en: There are really aurumatons in the Aurum Alley!

t_ch: 「公司」的报价你看了吗？
t_en: Have you checked IPC's offer?

t_ch: 但这是我祖上传下的店铺。
t_en: This store is a legacy of my ancestors.

t_ch: 我本想大声痛斥他！
t_en: I wanted to yell at him at first!

t_ch: 可他们给的实在太多了。
t_en: But they offered a price I couldn't refuse...

t_ch: 让我再想想吧……
t_en: I need some time to think about it...

t_ch: 听说对面那栋高高的楼…
t_en: I heard that the tall building over there...

t_ch: 被星际和平公司盘下了。
t_en: Got bought out by the Interastral Peace Corporation.

t_ch: 真的吗？看不出来呀…
t_en: Really? I can't tell...

t_ch: 看上去和仙舟建筑没差。
t_en: It looks just like a Xianzhou building.

t_ch: 这就是你不懂了…
t_en: Tell you what...

t_ch: 这是跨星企业的本地化。
t_en: This is the localization of a multi-planetary company.

t_ch: 货船上的货物不包装吗？
t_en: Don't the goods on the freight skiff need to be packed?

t_ch: 你是说用箱子之类包装…
t_en: Do you mean packing them in crates...

t_ch: 是呀，难道不用装进箱子？
t_en: Yup. Don't they need to be put into crates?

t_ch: 当然装进箱子里更合理！
t_en: It's better to store goods in crates, of course!

t_ch: 但显然这样摆放更有趣。
t_en: But it makes things more interesting if you don't.

t_ch: 你听听你都说了什么！
t_en: Listen to just how ridiculous you sound!

t_ch: 看着这一箱货物价格…
t_en: That's the price for one crate?

t_ch: 比我一年的工资都高…
t_en: I don't even make that much in a year...

t_ch: 心态实在是受不了了。
t_en: This is so demoralizing.

t_ch: 别因为这点儿小事辞职。
t_en: Don't quit over a small matter like this.

t_ch: 道理我都懂，可是嫉妒心…
t_en: I get it, but I just can't help feeling envious...

t_ch: 不，你没有理解我的意思。
t_en: No, you don't get what I mean.

t_ch: 看到那小货运星槎了吗？
t_en: See that small freight starskiff?

t_ch: 比我俩工资加起来都高。
t_en: Its price is higher than our combined salary.

t_ch: …我懂了，谢谢你。
t_en: ... I get it now. Thank you.

t_ch: 你知道吗，你们的丹士长…
t_en: Did you hear that your chief alchemist...

t_ch: 是个药王秘传的信徒。
t_en: ...is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 我早就觉得她不对劲了…
t_en: I knew there was something up with her!

t_ch: 真的吗，我都没看出来…
t_en: Really? I didn't realize it at all...

t_ch: 你是什么时候发现的呢？
t_en: When did you find out about that?

t_ch: 她给我考评绩效的时候…
t_en: When she carried out the performance appraisal for me...

t_ch: 那是正常人能干的事儿？
t_en: Is that something normal people can do?

t_ch: 丹鼎司要一直戒备下去？
t_en: Is the Alchemy Commission gonna be under watch forever?

t_ch: 据说还有在逃药王秘传…
t_en: I hear there are still Disciples of Sanctus Medicus on the run...

t_ch: 不过要我说，也抓不全…
t_en: If you ask me, I'd say it's impossible to catch them all...

t_ch: 没人会蠢到自投罗网。
t_en: No one would be dumb enough to walk into a trap.

t_ch: 哎，很担心丹鼎司的未来。
t_en: Alas, I'm very worried about the future of the Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 担心好你自己就行。
t_en: You should just care about your own affairs.

t_ch: 你说自己是地衡司执事？
t_en: You say you're a Realm-Keeping Commission officer?

t_ch: 对，为了照顾你我休假了。
t_en: Yes. I took time off to look after you.

t_ch: 我们前世关系很好嘛。
t_en: We were close in our previous lifetimes.

t_ch: 是啊，你蜕生后没人照顾…
t_en: Yes. No one took care of you after you went through the hatching rebirth...

t_ch: 大家都说让我来照顾你。
t_en: Everyone told me I should take care of you.

t_ch: 我前世是个怎样的人啊？
t_en: What kind of person was I in my previous life?

t_ch: 是个小偷，我抓捕归案的。
t_en: You were a thief, and you were arrested by me.

t_ch: 震惊！
t_en: I'm shocked!

t_ch: 别担心，前世跟你没关系。
t_en: Don't worry. You have nothing to do with your previous incarnation.

t_ch: 你们店里那个伙计不在？
t_en: Is that guy working today?

t_ch: 那个胖胖的，圆圆的那个。
t_en: You know, the big fella?

t_ch: 不在，我让他回去休息了。
t_en: Nope. I let him take a day off.

t_ch: 他犯了什么事儿了吗？
t_en: Did he do anything wrong?

t_ch: 没有，只是他影响销量…
t_en: No, but he affected our sales...

t_ch: 最近我们店强推减肥药。
t_en: Recently, we've been promoting slimming pills.

t_ch: 你是不是瞧不起别人？
t_en: Are you looking down on me?

t_ch: 你可不能诬陷好人呐。
t_en: You shouldn't throw mud at good people.

t_ch: 那个江湖郎中是你爸爸？
t_en: Is that traveling healer your father?

t_ch: 江湖郎中只是他的伪装。
t_en: The "traveling healer" is just his disguise.

t_ch: 他其实是地衡司的密探。
t_en: He's actually a secret agent of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 密探好酷，你怎么知道的？
t_en: That's so cool. How did you know about that?

t_ch: 因为我有读心术的能力。
t_en: I can read people's minds.

t_ch: 我看你是有妄想的能力。
t_en: I think you're delusional.

t_ch: 我听说你被批评了？
t_en: I heard that you were criticized.

t_ch: 哎，一言难尽……
t_en: Alas, it's complicated...

t_ch: 就当是对心境的磨炼吧。
t_en: I'll see it as a chance to train myself to be tougher.

t_ch: 几句话罢了，别往心里去。
t_en: Don't take the comments to heart.

t_ch: 你还年轻，免不了要……
t_en: At your age, it's all part of the process...

t_ch: …能不能让我清净会儿。
t_en: ... Can you just pipe down for a bit?

t_ch: 这事连我也听说了。
t_en: Even I have heard about the matter.

t_ch: 那可不嘛，动静可大了。
t_en: Well, it's caused quite a stir.

t_ch: 实在是有点匪夷所思……
t_en: It's quite baffling...

t_ch: 我都见怪不怪了。
t_en: I'm not surprised.

t_ch: 所有人都惊叹波月古海…
t_en: Everyone was amazed...

t_ch: 受龙尊敕命而起。
t_en: ...when the Lunarescent Depths parted with the high elder's command.

t_ch: 只有我一个人在思考…
t_en: I was the only one who was curious about...

t_ch: 水什么时候会流下去。
t_en: ...when the water would flow back.

t_ch: 爸爸，妈妈也在那里吗？
t_en: Dad, is Mom there too?

t_ch: 嗯…过几天我带你去见她。
t_en: Yes... I'll bring you to her in a couple of days.

t_ch: 她还在生我的气吗？
t_en: Is she still mad at me?

t_ch: 没有…哎……
t_en: No...

t_ch: 我闭上眼就能看到他……
t_en: I can see him every time I close my eyes...

t_ch: 你得休息休息。
t_en: You need to rest.

t_ch: 我睡不着……
t_en: I can't sleep...

t_ch: 你得坚强。
t_en: You have to be strong.

t_ch: 那个大姐姐哭得好惨……
t_en: That lady is bawling her eyes out...

t_ch: 因为万物终有尽头。
t_en: It's because all things come to an end.

t_ch: 你怎么突然文绉绉的？
t_en: Why are you waxing poetic all of a sudden?

t_ch: 呃，这是我爸的原话！
t_en: Um, that was what my father said!

t_ch: 罗浮是要举办葬礼了吗？
t_en: Is a funeral happening on the Luofu soon?

t_ch: 化外民将这叫作葬礼…
t_en: The Outworlders call this a funeral...

t_ch: 活了几百年，第一次参加…
t_en: Having lived for centuries, this has been my first time participating in a funeral...

t_ch: 能讲讲我要做什么吗？
t_en: Can you tell me what I should do?

t_ch: 通常来说，只要出席葬礼…
t_en: Generally speaking, your attendance at the funeral itself...

t_ch: 就已经说明了很多事情。
t_en: ...means a lot.

t_ch: 希望如此吧。
t_en: I hope so.

t_ch: 原来他们也会办葬礼啊……
t_en: So they also hold funerals... huh...

t_ch: 怎么，梦想破灭了？
t_en: Is your dream dashed?

t_ch: 不是，只是有点感触。
t_en: No, I'm just feeling a bit sentimental.

t_ch: 生命的尽头，会有什么呢……
t_en: I wonder what lies at the end of life...

t_ch: 年纪轻轻的叹什么气？
t_en: Why are you sighing at such a young age?
*sigh*

t_ch: 因为…他？
t_en: Is it because of... him?
*sigh*

t_ch: 你收到邀请了吗？
t_en: Did you get the invitation?

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Yup.

t_ch: 这个「奠仪」…要怎么弄？
t_en: How should we go about this soul-soothing ceremony?

t_ch: 我想想啊……
t_en: Let me think about it...

t_ch: 我从来没有参加过「奠仪」…
t_en: I've never taken part in a soul-soothing ceremony before...

t_ch: 用星槎就真能寄托哀思？
t_en: They use a starskiff to send condolences?

t_ch: 你的家人也离开了吗？
t_en: Has your family member passed away too?

t_ch: 她提前发作了魔阴身…
t_en: She had an early-onset mara attack...

t_ch: 十王司的判官来过…
t_en: The Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission came...

t_ch: 却错过了带走她的机会。
t_en: ...but missed out on the chance to take her away.

t_ch: 那就相信星槎吧…
t_en: Just believe in the starskiff...

t_ch: 它会载着你的哀思…
t_en: It will carry your thoughts and affection...

t_ch: 去往她所在的彼岸的。
t_en: ...to the other side where she is located.

t_ch: 好久没在驾校见到你了！
t_en: I haven't seen you at the driving school for ages!

t_ch: 好久没见到我，想我了？
t_en: Do you miss me?

t_ch: 怀念一起学星槎的日子。
t_en: I miss the days we learned starskiff manufacturing together.

t_ch: 不像现在，你不在了…
t_en: Now, you're no longer here...

t_ch: 教练只骂我一人。
t_en: The coach only scolds me.

t_ch: 哎，码头还没彻底恢复运作，咱们就来上班了。
t_en: *sigh* The docks hasn't even fully resumed operations yet, but here we are, working.

t_ch: 你说，我们之后会去向何方？
t_en: Where do you think we will be heading next?

t_ch: 我打算待会去码头整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: I'm gonna go get some fried potato sticks at the docks.

t_ch: 你误会我了伙计，我说的是咱们这一辈子终极目标。
t_en: That's not what I'm saying, buddy. I'm talking about our lifelong goals.

t_ch: 我们是长生种，可以活得很久，可归根到底，活这这么久是为了什么？
t_en: We do have a really long life. But honestly, what's the purpose to live such a long time?

t_ch: 为了去码头整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: To get some fried potato sticks at the docks.

t_ch: 这里和以前不一样了……
t_en: This place isn't the same as it used to be...

t_ch: …我觉得没什么区别啊。
t_en: ... It looks the same to me.

t_ch: 上次来的时候，小吃摊的老板还请我吃了串糖，可惜这次都见不着他了。想来，恐怕他已经……
t_en: When I was here last time, the stall owner treated me to candies. It's a shame that he isn't here now. I think he must have...

t_ch: 且慢，你「上次来」是什么时候？
t_en: Hold on. When was the last time you were here?

t_ch: 哎，上次来的时候我还是个小孩子，也就是几十年前的事吧。
t_en: Well, I was still a kid when I was here last time. It was a few decades ago.

t_ch: 打住打住！小吃摊的老板我认识，他这几年赚够钱不干了，顿顿大鱼大肉的，好得很呐！
t_en: Hey, I know the stall owner! He's earned enough over the years to retire and is living a pretty comfortable life now!

t_ch: 包子大，饺子小。几个包子就吃饱。
t_en: Dumplings and steamed buns! The buns are huge — just a few and you'll be full!

t_ch: 又好吃，又美味。花钱不多挺实惠。
t_en: They are delicious, and they don't cost you much.

t_ch: 皮还薄，馅还大。好面好馅不要怕。
t_en: The filling is generously wrapped in just enough skin. Don't worry about the quality of the ingredients.

t_ch: 趁热吃，别烫嘴。吃完以后心里美。
t_en: Enjoy them while they are hot, but don't burn your tongue. Fill up your tummy and your heart.

t_ch: 你好，健身武术要了解一下吗？
t_en: Hi! Interested in fitness and martial arts?

t_ch: 我们形虎拳馆可是仙舟上的老字号，今年正巧是百年店庆大酬宾活动——
t_en: The Tiger Boxing Gym is a well-established one on the Xianzhou. Today happens to be our <unbreak>100</unbreak>th anniversary...

t_ch: 只要购买我们的「一对一拳法特训」项目，就额外赠送三百节「形虎拳惬意放松练」课程。
t_en: With the purchase of our One-on-one Boxing Training, you will get <unbreak>300</unbreak> sessions of Tiger Boxing Easy Class for free.

t_ch: 强身健体，不容错过！怎么样，感兴趣的话可以进来免费跟练哦！
t_en: Don't miss the opportunity to keep fit! Come in for a free trial session if you are interested!

t_ch: 「公司」那边给出的报价你看了吗？我觉得这价格还算厚道。
t_en: Have you checked IPC's offer? I think it's quite generous.

t_ch: 但这是我祖上传下的店铺，我从小就在这铺子里长大……
t_en: This store is a legacy of my ancestors. I grew up here...

t_ch: 哎，我能理解你，毕竟我也是在金人巷长大的，但我还是签字了…没办法，他们给的实在是太多了。
t_en: I could understand how you feel, as I, too, grew up in the Aurum Alley. Still, I've penned the contract as their offer is simply irresistible.

t_ch: 让我再想想吧……
t_en: I need some time to think about it...

t_ch: 我想过了，我实在不能为了钱，就这么把我家几代人的珍贵回忆卖出去！起码…起码得让「公司」把赔偿金额翻两倍。
t_en: I've thought it through. I can't make myself sell the precious memory of my family just for money! Unless... IPC doubles the compensation.

t_ch: 不不不，不对，三倍，三倍以下免谈！
t_en: No, I want triple the sum! Anything less than that is out of the question!

t_ch: 我听说，你最近又被人点名批评了？怎么回事啊，你不是才进丹鼎司没多久嘛……
t_en: I heard you've been criticized again recently. What happened? Haven't you just joined the Alchemy Commission for a short time?

t_ch: 哎，遇到件特别无语的事罢了，总之一言难尽。
t_en: *sighs* I was involved in a pretty absurd matter. Anyway, it's a long story.

t_ch: 出什么事了，跟我说说嘛，咱俩难得有缘，能在丹鼎司共事。你放心好了，我嘴巴很密的，绝不会给你传出去。
t_en: Why don't you tell me about it, we are colleagues, aren't we? Don't worry. I'm good at keeping secrets.

t_ch: 没什么，是我丹方写得不够严谨。
t_en: It's just that I'm not meticulous enough when making prescriptions.

t_ch: 哎呀，批评指正若是合理的话，你就当是对心境的磨炼吧。
t_en: Well, if the criticism is justified, you should just see it as a chance to train yourself to be tougher.

t_ch: 若是说话难听，几句话罢了，你也别往心里去，就当是过堂风，一阵就过了。
t_en: If the comments are too harsh, don't take them to heart. You'll soon be over it.

t_ch: 谁年轻的时候没犯过错？你还年轻，免不了得走上这么一遭，涨涨教训也好……
t_en: Who didn't make mistakes when they were young? It's part of the process for your age. Just take it as a lesson...

t_ch: 停停停…你能不能让我清净会儿啊？你吵得我头疼。
t_en: Stop, stop, stop... Can you just pipe down for a bit? You're giving me a headache.

t_ch: 这件事传得这么快啊？就连我妹妹都跑过来跟我说了。
t_en: The word got out pretty quickly, huh? Even my sister came and told me about it.

t_ch: 那可不嘛，这事闹的啊…动静可大了！
t_en: Well, it's caused quite a stir.

t_ch: 所以到底是出什么事了呢？怎么大家都在传……
t_en: So, what exactly is going on? Why is everyone talking about it...

t_ch: 就是…有个医士给人开了个丹丸，结果那家伙没看完医嘱，直接把丹丸吞下去了。
t_en: Here's the story... A healer prescribed a pellet to a patient. As it turned out, the patient swallowed the entire pellet without reading the prescription in full.

t_ch: 但那颗丹本是用蜡封好的，足足有拳头大小！医嘱上写得清清楚楚——要剖开后取其中的药引吞服。我都不知道他是怎么吞下去的……
t_en: But that pellet, sealed in wax, was as big as someone's fist! The prescription laid it out very clearly that the patient had to cut the pellet open and consume the medicinal extract inside. I have no idea how the patient managed to swallow the pellet...

t_ch: 拳头那么大？这都吞得下去…实在是有点匪夷所思……
t_en: As big as a fist? It's unbelievable that the patient could swallow it...

t_ch: 确实…不过我在丹鼎司也混了些年头，病患见了不少，现在都有些见怪不怪了。
t_en: Indeed... However, I'm not surprised by it. After all, I've dealt with all sorts of patients over the years at the Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 爸爸，妈妈也在那里吗？我听叔叔说，阿姨和妈妈都在那里面……
t_en: Dad, is Mom there too? Uncle told me that Mom and Aunt are both in there...

t_ch: 嗯，她在那儿…总之，过几天吧，过几天爸爸就带你去见她。
t_en: Yes, she's there... Let's wait for a couple more days, then I'll bring you to her.

t_ch: 爸爸你说实话，妈妈是不是还在生我的气…要不然她怎么还不回家啊?
t_en: Dad, please tell me the truth. Is Mom still mad at me... Otherwise, why doesn't she come home?

t_ch: 没有，她怎么会生你的气呢…哎…她以后都不会再生气了……
t_en: No. How can she be mad at you? *sigh* She can never be angry again...

t_ch: 以后都不会了…不会了……
t_en: Never again... Never...

t_ch: 爸爸，你说的是「不会生气」是什么意思？我、我有点不明白……
t_en: Dad, what do you mean by that? I—I don't get it...

t_ch: 没事，等你以后长大就明白了。
t_en: It's fine. You'll understand when you're older.

t_ch: 我现在一闭上眼就能看到他……
t_en: I can see him every time I close my eyes...

t_ch: 你几天没合眼了？你得休息休息，这样下去可不行。
t_en: How long have you been awake? You need to rest. You can't go on like this.

t_ch: 我也不知道…他走之后，家里空荡荡的，我怎么都睡不着。
t_en: I have no idea... Since he left, the house was so empty, I couldn't sleep.

t_ch: 你就当是为了他吧——他肯定也不想看到你现在这样，你得坚强一点。
t_en: Just do it for his sake. I'm sure he wouldn't want to see you in this state. You need to be strong.

t_ch: 别的不说，你这样子怎么出席「慰灵奠仪」呢？你要好好活下去，无论如何，你都得振作起来……
t_en: Other matters aside, how are you going to attend the soul-soothing ceremony looking like this? Your life must go on, and you need to buck up...

t_ch: 我出门的时候，听见我们家对门的大姐姐哭得好惨哇……
t_en: When I was heading out, I heard the lady across the street bawling her eyes out...

t_ch: 那是在准备那个仪式，我爸妈最近都在忙这事。
t_en: She's getting ready for the ceremony, which my parents have been working on lately.

t_ch: 仪式？那是什么？
t_en: Ceremony? What's that?

t_ch: 哎，你还小，因为万物终有尽头…这种事情你得长大了才会明白。
t_en: *sigh* You're still a little kid. All things come to an end... You'll only understand it when you're older.

t_ch: …你说话怎么突然文绉绉的，这不像你诶。
t_en: ... Why are you waxing poetic all of a sudden? This is so not like you.

t_ch: 呃，刚才那句其实是我爸的原话……
t_en: Um, that was actually what my father said...

t_ch: 仙舟罗浮是要举办葬礼了吗？我还是第一次见到。
t_en: Is a funeral happening on the Xianzhou Luofu soon? It's my first time seeing it.

t_ch: 原来你们那里管这样的事儿叫作葬礼……
t_en: So you guys call this thing a funeral...

t_ch: 我也不是见识短，我听说过葬礼的存在，只不过我活了几百年，才第一次参加。
t_en: I've heard of it, but this has been my first time participating in one in my entire life.

t_ch: 请问…我的云骑军朋友不在了，我应该做些什么事情吗？
t_en: May I know... what I can do for my deceased Cloud Knight friend?

t_ch: 通常来说，你不需要做些什么，只要你出席葬礼，就已经说明了很多事情。
t_en: Generally speaking, you don't have to do anything. Your attendance at the funeral itself means a lot.

t_ch: 你的朋友一定会感受到的。
t_en: Your friend will surely feel it.

t_ch: 希望如此吧，谢谢你。
t_en: I hope so. Thank you.

t_ch: 我打听到了，原来他们搞的这个仪式，就是仙舟式的葬礼。
t_en: I've got it. It turns out that this ceremony of theirs is a Xianzhou funeral.

t_ch: 原来他们也会办葬礼啊…我还以为他们真的……
t_en: So they also hold funerals... huh... I thought they'd be...

t_ch: 你怎么一副失望的样子，梦碎了？
t_en: Why do you look so disappointed? Is your dream dashed?

t_ch: 什么梦碎？别瞎说。我只是有点感触而已。我要找的那个英雄，是云骑军中的一员，这次就在其中…不幸离世……
t_en: What are you talking about? I'm just feeling a bit sentimental. The hero I'm looking for is one of the Cloud Knights. Unfortunately, he has passed away...

t_ch: 你老家的那个童话？那个用残剑拯救数百人的「长剑骑士」？
t_en: Are you talking about your hometown fairy tale? The one about the "Longsword Knight" that rescued hundreds of people with a battered sword?

t_ch: 嗯，就是他…不是童话，是几百年前的历史记载。我原以为他是无所不能的英雄，所以注定不会和我们一样生老病死…可没想到……
t_en: Yes, it's him... It isn't a fairy tale, but a historical event that took place centuries ago. I thought he was an invincible hero that was spared from illness and death. Little did I know...

t_ch: 不知道该怎么说，看他们办葬礼，我有点感触…你说，在生命的尽头，究竟会有什么在等着我们呢？
t_en: For some reason, seeing the funeral makes me feel a bit sentimental... What do you think lies at the end of life?
*sigh*

t_ch: 够了啊，你这一天叹了多少次气了。我说你年纪轻轻的，叹什么气啊？
t_en: That's enough sighing for one day. Why are you sighing at such a young age?

t_ch: 哎…哎！说了你也不懂。
t_en: *sigh* You won't get it even if I tell you.

t_ch: …因为他那个奠仪的事？没邀请你，所以你心里不舒服？
t_en: ... Are you bothered because you weren't invited to his soul-soothing ceremony?

t_ch: 是，但也不是…其他人都被邀请了，连「她」也在，哎……
t_en: Yes, and no... Everyone else was invited, and even "she" was there. Alas...

t_ch: 所以你吃醋了？
t_en: Are you jealous?

t_ch: 才不是呢，我是觉得那姑娘也挺漂亮的，怎么就瞎了眼肯去…哎……
t_en: Not at all. I just wonder what got into the beautiful girl's head that made her go to the funeral... *sigh*

t_ch: 你应该也收到邀请了吧？
t_en: You have got the invitation, haven't you?

t_ch: 你说的是他的奠仪吗？嗯。
t_en: Are you talking about his soul-soothing ceremony? Yes.

t_ch: 冒昧请教一下，是这样的，这个「奠仪」…其实我还从未参加过，我听说你们一族对此颇有经验，能否指点我一下？
t_en: In fact, I've never participated in this ceremony before, and I heard that your clan is quite experienced in it. Could you give me some advice?

t_ch: 要参加的话，我得准备什么东西去吗？有什么要注意的吗？
t_en: Do I need to prepare anything for it? Is there anything I should pay attention to?

t_ch: 按我们的规矩…你看看他生前喜欢什么吧…准备好之后将送别的礼物，放在他的星槎上。
t_en: According to our practice, you may find out what he liked when he was alive. Then, prepare the gift and put it on his starskiff.

t_ch: 原来如此…多谢指教！
t_en: I see... Thanks for the advice!

t_ch: 你确定不去？这家「尚滋味」口碑挺好的呀，我想去试试它家的新品诶……
t_en: Are you sure you don't want to go? Spices Supreme has great reviews, and I want to try their new dish...

t_ch: 口碑好不代表质量高，「尚滋味」是吧？你看它这价格…
t_en: Good reviews don't mean good quality. Spices Supreme, right? Just take a look at the prices...

t_ch: 啧，低价能买到什么好食材，你说做买卖哪有赔本的，那就说明肯定是用了些质量不佳的便宜货！
t_en: Tsk, how can they afford to use good ingredients with these prices? They'd be doing this business at a loss! They must be using cheap, poor-quality ingredients!

t_ch: 好啦好啦，你说白了不就是「不贵的不吃」呗。
t_en: Fine. I get it that you only eat expensive stuff.

t_ch: 那不一样，我这是返璞归真，像我这样注重食材品质的老饕不多了！
t_en: You're missing the point. I'm just focusing on the basics. Nowadays, there aren't many gormandizers like me who cares about the quality of ingredients!

t_ch: 请小心行事，不要乱走
t_en: Please be careful and don't wander around.

t_ch: 我和云泓入伍两百年…
t_en: I've been in the army with Yunhong for two hundred years now...

t_ch: 第一次见他如此疯狂
t_en: This is the first time I've seen him so obsessed.

t_ch: 听说那些妖人在风中下毒
t_en: I heard those devils can poison the air.

t_ch: 会令人丧神失志
t_en: It causes you to completely lose your mind and spirit.

t_ch: 不碍事…过会儿便好了
t_en: It's okay... It'll be fine in a bit.

t_ch: 药王赐福，快快降临…
t_en: O quickly bless us, Sanctus Medicus...

t_ch: 魁首大人决不会失败！
t_en: The master primus will never fail!

t_ch: 观察…判断…
t_en: Observe... Judge...

t_ch: 等待军令…
t_en: Awaiting orders...

t_ch: 抱歉，此处暂不通行。
t_en: I'm sorry. This area is blocked off.

t_ch: 发生什么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 我也想知道…
t_en: I'm curious, too...

t_ch: 抱歉，我无法透露。
t_en: Sorry, I'm unable to comment.

t_ch: 我和云泓一起入伍两百年，大家都是托付生死的好兄弟…
t_en: I've been in the army with Yunhong for two hundred years now. We've trusted each other with our lives...

t_ch: 可刚才他一发狂起来连我都不认得了！
t_en: But just now when he went berserk, he couldn't even recognize me!

t_ch: 真是歹毒啊，不知药王秘传的妖人们使了什么法子…
t_en: It's really vicious. Who knows what tricks those Sanctus Medicus devils have up their sleeves...

t_ch: 太卜带着斥候前去探查了，希望她能找到解救的法子。
t_en: The master diviner took scouts over to investigate. I hope she can find a way to settle all of this.

t_ch: 不必担心，我刚刚服了药，要不了片刻伤口就会长好。
t_en: Don't worry. I just took some medicine and the wound will heal up soon.

s_en: Disciple On the Verge of Mara
t_ch: 呜…我感觉到了赐福在我体内，不停成长。
t_en: Oooh... I can feel the blessings in my bones, growing inside me.

s_en: Disciple On the Verge of Mara
t_ch: 等我展露出仙道神通，你，还有你，一个都逃不了！
t_en: Once I reveal my celestial powers, neither you — nor you — will be able to escape!

t_ch: 这名药王秘传的信徒发出沉重的喘息，似乎受了不小的伤。
t_en: This Disciple of Sanctus Medicus lets out a heavy gasp, as though suffering from severe injuries.

t_ch: 魁首大人决不会失败的！纵有千军万马，云骑也不可能克服魔阴身的障碍！
t_en: The master primus will never fail! Even with all their power, the Cloud Knights will never be able to overcome the woes of mara!

t_ch: 而且，她可不是孤军作战…嘿嘿，哈哈哈。
t_en: And, she's not fighting alone... Heh heh, bwahaha!

t_ch: 观察…判断…
t_en: Observe... Judge...

t_ch: 金人看不见的视线扫过了你，你感到毛发耸立。
t_en: The aurumaton's invisible gaze sweeps over you. You can feel your hairs stand up on end.

t_ch: 无罪囚记录…安全。
t_en: Acquitted records, none... Entity safe.

t_ch: 大哥，这儿到底发生什么事了？
t_en: Hello sir, just what in the world is going on here?

t_ch: 我也想知道…我公务都还没办完呢，这儿就被封锁了。现在为什么突然来了一大队人马要疏散我们？
t_en: Wish I knew... I haven't even finished my work yet but this place has been blocked off. And why are all these people rushing to evacuate us now?

t_ch: 抱歉，军令如山，我无法透露更多。还有，我是女的。
t_en: I'm sorry. Orders are orders. I can't tell you any more. Also, I'm a woman.

t_ch: 求求你了大姐，你就说说吧？就透露一点儿行不？
t_en: I'm begging you, ma'am — can you tell us more? Just a little bit?

t_ch: 等待军令…请发令。
t_en: Awaiting orders... Please dispatch orders.

t_ch: 你摊了摊手，示意自己没有任何指示。
t_en: You spread open your hands, indicating that you have no order to give.

t_ch: 金人的机杼微微颤动，仿佛焦躁不安地渴望战斗。
t_en: The aurumaton trembles slightly, as if anxious to fight.

t_ch: 抱歉，不是要阻拦将军的贵客，只是提醒您，前方出现了某些危险异象。为了安全起见，还请留在云骑戍守的区域里。
t_en: Sorry, I didn't want to stop the general's distinguished guests, but just to warn you, there have been some dangerous sightings ahead. For your own safety, please stay in the areas guarded by the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 「欢迎来到昏光庭院。请问有什么可以帮到您？」是…像这样吗？
t_en: "Welcome to the Twilight Courtyard. How can I help you?" ...Like this?

t_ch: 笑，笑容，温暖的笑容…塞涅俄丝大人，这可是最关键的哦。
t_en: Smiles, laughter... A warm smile is most important, Lady Seliose.
